note: Abstract deadlines change yearly. Dates below were verified against each society's official call-for-abstracts on the date above. Always confirm on the official site (linked) before relying on a deadline. 'Typical timing' describes the usual annual rhythm so you can anticipate next year's cycle before exact dates publish.

conferences.name: AACR Annual Meeting
conferences.full_name: American Association for Cancer Research Annual Meeting
conferences.typical_timing: Meeting in April. Regular abstracts due mid-November (prior year); late-breaking & clinical-trials abstracts due mid-January.

guidelines: Late-breaking/clinical-trials submission opens Dec 11, 2025.
Manuscript submission for simultaneous publication: Jan 20, 2026 (regular), Feb 17, 2026 (LB/CT).
Presenting author must be an AACR member (membership can be obtained during submission).

conferences.name: ASCO Annual Meeting
conferences.full_name: American Society of Clinical Oncology Annual Meeting
conferences.focus: Clinical oncology — practice-changing trials across all tumor types
conferences.typical_timing: Meeting late May / early June. Regular abstracts due late January; late-breaking early March (a placeholder shell abstract is due at the regular deadline).

deadlines.label: Late-breaking abstracts
deadlines.note: Requires a placeholder shell abstract submitted by the Jan 27 regular deadline.

guidelines: Submit via the ASCO abstract portal; a shell abstract is required to be eligible for late-breaking.
Encore and prior-publication policies apply — review ASCO abstract policies & embargoes.

conferences.name: ASH Annual Meeting
conferences.full_name: American Society of Hematology Annual Meeting & Exposition
conferences.focus: Malignant & benign hematology — the largest hematology meeting
conferences.typical_timing: Meeting in December. Abstracts due early August.

guidelines: $95 non-refundable handling fee per abstract (credit card only).
Online submission only — emailed abstracts are not accepted.
Presenting authors of accepted abstracts must attend in person.

conferences.name: EHA Congress
conferences.focus: Hematology (malignant & benign) — the major European hematology meeting
conferences.typical_timing: Congress in June. Submission opens January; regular abstracts due early March; late-breaking early May.

guidelines: Abstract submission terms & conditions are published annually (PDF on the EHA site).

conferences.name: ESMO Congress
conferences.full_name: European Society for Medical Oncology Congress
conferences.focus: Medical oncology — the major European oncology meeting
conferences.typical_timing: Congress in autumn (Oct/Nov). Abstracts (incl. preliminary late-breaking) due mid-May; finalized late-breaking due early September.

guidelines: A preliminary version of any intended late-breaking abstract must be submitted by the May deadline.
Review the ESMO Congress 2026 abstract regulations (PDF) for category-specific rules.

conferences.name: SOHO Annual Meeting
conferences.full_name: Society of Hematologic Oncology Annual Meeting
conferences.focus: Hematologic malignancies — leukemia, lymphoma, myeloma, MPN/MDS
conferences.typical_timing: Meeting in September (Houston). Abstracts due mid-May.

guidelines: 350-word limit (title, authors, keywords, affiliations excluded).
No tables, figures, graphs, or images.
Submit electronically in Microsoft Word format.
Top poster presentation receives a prize; presenting author gets complimentary registration (travel not reimbursed).

conferences.name: SITC Annual Meeting
conferences.full_name: Society for Immunotherapy of Cancer Annual Meeting
conferences.typical_timing: Meeting in November. Regular abstracts typically due mid-July; late-breaking mid-September. Confirm exact dates on the official site.

deadlines.label: Regular abstracts
deadlines.note: Typically mid-July — confirm on the SITC abstract page.

deadlines.label: Late-breaking abstracts
deadlines.note: Typically mid-September — confirm on the SITC abstract page.

guidelines: 41st Annual Meeting & Pre-Conference Programs.
Exact 2026 abstract deadlines were not yet posted at last verification — check the official abstract page.

conferences.name: ASTRO Annual Meeting
conferences.full_name: American Society for Radiation Oncology Annual Meeting
conferences.focus: Radiation oncology — relevant for radiation-focused trainees & multidisciplinary work
conferences.typical_timing: Meeting in late September. Submission opens early December; abstracts due late February; late-breaking final data due mid-July.

guidelines: $75 non-refundable fee per abstract.
No new authors may be added after the submission deadline.

conferences.name: ASCO GI Cancers Symposium
conferences.typical_timing: Symposium in January (San Francisco). Abstracts due early September (prior year); typo-correction window into mid-November.

deadlines.label: Abstracts
deadlines.note: All authors & disclosures must be complete by this date.

guidelines: Held jointly by ASCO, AGA, ASTRO, and SSO.
Next cycle (2027) abstracts typically due early September 2026 — watch the ASCO GI dates page.

conferences.name: ASCO GU Cancers Symposium
conferences.focus: Genitourinary malignancies — prostate, kidney, bladder, testicular
conferences.typical_timing: Symposium in late January / February. Abstracts typically due late September / early October (prior year). Confirm on the ASCO GU dates page.

deadlines.label: Abstracts
deadlines.note: Typically late September / early October — confirm on the ASCO GU dates page.

guidelines: Held jointly by ASCO, ASTRO, and SUO.

conferences.name: SABCS
conferences.typical_timing: Symposium in December (San Antonio). Abstracts typically due mid-June; late-breaking early October. Confirm on the SABCS site.

deadlines.label: Abstracts
deadlines.note: Typically mid-June — confirm on the SABCS abstract page.

deadlines.label: Late-breaking abstracts
deadlines.note: Typically early October — confirm on the SABCS abstract page.

guidelines: Co-sponsored by AACR, UT Health San Antonio, and Baylor College of Medicine.

conferences.name: ASCO Gynecologic / Other Symposia
conferences.focus: Gynecologic and other subspecialty oncology themed sessions
conferences.typical_timing: ASCO runs several smaller thematic meetings through the year. Deadlines vary — check the ASCO meetings calendar for the specific symposium.

deadlines.label: Varies by symposium
deadlines.note: See the ASCO meetings calendar for specific symposium deadlines.

guidelines: Use this as a pointer to ASCO's full meetings calendar for niche/subspecialty deadlines.

conferences.name: Tandem Meetings (ASTCT | CIBMTR)
conferences.full_name: Transplantation & Cellular Therapy Meetings of ASTCT and CIBMTR
conferences.focus: Hematopoietic cell transplant, cellular & gene therapy
conferences.typical_timing: Meeting in February. Abstracts typically due late October / early November (prior year); late-breaking in December.

guidelines: For 2027: regular abstracts typically due late October / early November 2026 — watch the Tandem Key Dates page.
